title: Flipper One Tech Specs
summary: The Flipper One is a multi-tool device for pentesting and hardware hacking, not an AI/ML product. Its tech specs detail hardware components like an ESP32-S3, nRF52840, and CC1101 transceiver, focusing on RFID, NFC, infrared, and GPIO capabilities. The content is unrelated to AI/ML, scoring low on technical depth in that domain.
